brand.name: Drishya
brand.tagline: See it before you own it

hero.headline: Real Estate,
hero.body: We bring properties to life with photorealistic Gaussian Splat technology — so buyers can explore before they visit, and sellers close faster.
hero.click_hint: Click to change view · Scroll to discover

services.title: What We Create
services.subtitle: Three ways we make your property unforgettable
services.3d_desc: Photorealistic Gaussian Splat captures of your property — letting buyers explore every corner remotely, in stunning detail.
services.vr_desc: Fully immersive virtual reality tours built for headsets, phones and laptops. Buyers feel present before they visit.
services.video_desc: Cinematic 60-second reels crafted to convert — from drone aerials to interior walkthroughs, ready for social and print.

process.title: How It Works
process.subtitle: From booking to delivery in days, not weeks
process.step1_desc: We visit your property with our specialist cameras and scanning equipment. Most properties take 2–4 hours to capture.
process.step2_desc: Our team runs the data through our Gaussian Splat pipeline, generating a photorealistic 3D model within 24–48 hours.
process.step3_desc: We review with you, apply your branding, add floor plan overlays and create social media cuts as required.
process.step4_desc: You receive a shareable link, embed code and all assets — hosted on our servers, WhatsApp-ready from day one.

pricing.title: Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden costs. No surprises. Pay only for what you need.
pricing.currency_note: All prices in INR. USD equivalent shown in brackets.

testimonials.title: What Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real estate professionals across AP
testimonials.t1_text: The 3D walkthrough doubled our site visit conversions. Buyers were pre-sold before they even arrived. Drishyam's work is worth every rupee.
testimonials.t2_text: I've sold properties across Andhra for 12 years. This is the first time technology genuinely gave me an edge. The VR experience wowed my NRI clients.
testimonials.t3_text: Sampurna package covered everything — 3D, VR and the marketing reel. We used it across Instagram, our website and WhatsApp. Outstanding ROI.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before starting
faq.q1: Which types of properties do you work with?
faq.a1: We work with all residential and commercial properties — independent houses, villas, apartments, gated communities, commercial plots and under-construction projects.
faq.q2: How long does it take to deliver?
faq.a2: Standard delivery is 3–5 business days after the capture visit. Our express 48-hour service is available for urgent needs.
faq.q3: Do buyers need a VR headset?
faq.a3: No. The VR experience works in any modern browser on mobile or desktop. A VR headset (Quest, Cardboard, etc.) gives a more immersive experience but is entirely optional.
faq.q4: Can I share the 3D walkthrough on WhatsApp?
faq.a4: Yes — every project includes a short, mobile-optimised link you can share directly on WhatsApp, social media, or embed on your website.
faq.q5: Do you cover areas outside Guntur?
faq.a5: Currently we serve Guntur, Vijayawada, Tenali, Narasaraopet and Amaravati. We're expanding — contact us if your city isn't listed.
faq.q6: Is the pricing negotiable for multiple properties?
faq.a6: Yes. We offer tiered discounts for 3+ properties and monthly retainer contracts. Contact us to discuss a custom arrangement.
faq.q7: What if I'm not satisfied with the output?
faq.a7: The Darshana and Sampurna packages include unlimited revisions. Sparsha includes 1 revision. We work until you're happy.
